title: REALITY Historical Round -> External-Observation Projection (read-only spike)
description: A4.2A spike wrapper. Projects ONE MT-REAL-02 historical round summary onto a provenance-annotated, NON-canonical envelope. This is NOT an external observation record and is NEVER a merge gate. A projection only ever yields a canonical_candidate (still un-promoted) when every canonical required field is DIRECT or strictly DERIVED_DETERMINISTIC. Heuristic / synthesized / missing fields force PARTIAL or UNSUPPORTED with canonical_candidate=null. Canonical structural rules live in labs/interop-lab/reality_external_observation/ (NOT modified by this spike).

record_origin.description: Fixed. A projection is never a 'live' record; the live default is intentionally disallowed so an adapted historical round can never be mistaken for a native observation.

epoch.description: Coarse structural era of the source round (see report.md / a41 spike for the verified boundaries R44/R77/R82/R85). Phase-probe DIRECT data actually spans R80,R82,R83,R84 and is detected structurally, not by epoch alone.

projection_status.description: PROMOTABLE_CANDIDATE iff EVERY canonical required field is DIRECT or DERIVED_DETERMINISTIC. PARTIAL iff at least one canonical required field is DERIVED_HEURISTIC / SYNTHETIC_PLACEHOLDER / MISSING. UNSUPPORTED for rounds with no per-node observational data (pre-R44 / no-live tooling rounds).

field_provenance.description: Maps each canonical external_observation field path to how this projection obtained it.

warnings.description: Explicit, human-readable lossiness/synthesis disclosures (synthesized timestamp, gitrev-proxy fingerprint, lossy phase collapse, bi-modal collapse, missing matrix exit status, missing admission gate, missing recovery-chain depth, ...).

promotion_blockers.description: The minimal set of canonical field paths whose provenance is DERIVED_HEURISTIC / SYNTHETIC_PLACEHOLDER / MISSING and therefore block promotion. Empty iff projection_status == PROMOTABLE_CANDIDATE.

canonical_candidate.description: A candidate external_observation record, populated ONLY when projection_status == PROMOTABLE_CANDIDATE. Even when non-null it is a CANDIDATE only: it must NOT be written into the live observation corpus, must NOT be described as a formal external observation, and must NOT be counted as a dual-kernel parity increment.
